docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KATHERINE YIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GABRIELLE JONES IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT YIN, KATHERINE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT JONES, GABRIELLE $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,625.00 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
